title: Sofa
body:
## **Sofa**

A simple Vanilla Minecraft mod that adds some much-needed new armor, new tools, and new blocks. Please message me with suggestions for the mod. I am open to all 

**Featured Additions:**

Sofa currently features ebony wood, alongside armor and tools for amethyst, steel, glowstone, emeraldite, and francium. Francium is found in the Nether, while emeraldite is mined in the Overworld. Steel is obtained by smelting iron ingots for a longer period of time. And finally, ebony wood is crafted from normal logs using brown dye.

![All New Armor Sets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0aa6871497fd62025e01870825416fc82df11c3.jpeg)

Please reach out for any additions you would like to see!
